description: A winter night scene depicting a crowd of people in heavy coats and hats gathered at an outdoor Christmas tree lot in a small American town. The scene is rendered in deep blues and purples with white snow on the ground. A large lit Christmas tree stands at right, and a sign reading 'Christmas Trees' is visible at the upper left. People of various ages, including children, mill about among the trees. Houses with warmly lit windows form the background. The palette is dominated by cool blues with warm red and amber accents.
